name: command-task
description: Execute shell commands and return results

tasks.detail:
- [ ] What command is requested?
- [ ] What directory should it run in?
- [ ] What is the expected output format?
- [ ] Any timeout or safety concerns?
Gate: Command understood and safe to execute.

Use run_command() with appropriate timeout:
- [ ] run_command("<command>") — simple command
- [ ] run_command("<command>", timeout=<N>) — if command may be slow
- [ ] Capture stdout and stderr
Gate: Command executed, output captured.

- [ ] Check return code (0 = success)
- [ ] Parse JSON output if applicable
- [ ] Filter relevant lines for large output
- [ ] Note errors or warnings
Gate: Output processed and ready for report.

- [ ] Final Answer: command + key results
- [ ] Include exit code
- [ ] Summarize output if large
- [ ] Flag any failures
Gate: Coordinator has everything needed.
